fields.name: Generational Talent
fields.description: Some people are just born with an edge. Whether they use it is an entirely different story.
Grants 5 additional free attribute points during character creation.

fields.name: Old Soul
fields.description: Many people in the world have brief moments of deja vous, of all having been here before. You have considerably more than that. Odd things happen now and then, and you are left with a mystery of just who you might have been.
Grants one additional gift slot (Atavism) during character creation.

fields.name: Impoverished
fields.description: You're broke. Busted. Got nothin'. Try not to starve.

fields.name: Nemesis
fields.description: You have an implacable foe, someone who will stop at nothing to ruin you. They tend to show up at the worst possible moment.
